Boutique scale. Refined presence.

A Distinctive New Address

Brickell Eight pairs intimate scale with modern lines and elevated livability. The brand palette and presentation reflect understated luxury — warm neutrals, soft stone textures, and metallic champagne tones that feel timeless and premium.
